data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attribution model selection (first touch/last touch/custom)', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, yet there is no concrete evidence or checks that demonstrate its coverage. Therefore, the assessment reveals a gap in the requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or validation of the attribution model selection.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
